title: Tax' Dragon Legend
description: Dragon Legend is a Minecraft Forge modification aims to add dragon related endgame equipment.
body:
![taxdl.00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b1e10c56e6946cd8fa6b1e7a72daff95ebee4ac.png)
 
Overview:

Tax' Dragon Legend is a Minecraft Forge modification aims to add dragon related endgame equipment.


![taxdl.08](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/b9a55a903a48eebf575c87add274c691beef601f.png)
 

Update:

The Art update adds a Record Disc and a Painting Item.


![taxdl.07](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/dc6ab3cfba1963c90fbced46be343d1cfa721138.png)
 

Update:

Emissive textures updates adds glowing tool and armor parts. MoreMcmeta mod and the Emissive Textures plugin is needet for the glowing effect.


![taxdl.06](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/b09b6d59fd12707ff3aaaa9b75049189bd29c0b2.png)
 

Update:

The Shield Update adds a Dragon Shield.


![taxdl.06](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/ffd2efe4469b0c94bef94200e975decc798cba94.png)
 

Feature:

Slay the Ender Dragon to obtain the Dragon Scale and craft the Dragon armor and tools.

![taxdl.03](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/90b4e37191c2f5b04de8a4277741b679736504f6.png)
 
Installation:

Drag the .zip file in the mods folder located in ".minecraft".

![taxdl.02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/39138b8f7a50fa7acd715006c6834a0be65d02af.png)

Extra:

Dragon Breath, Dragon Eytra and Dragon Steak recipes. 


![taxld.10](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/4bf8e325b410b982120e99a9a108c25b434a34ff.png)

Statistic:

Sword = Enchantability 33, Harvest 5, Efficiency 17, Attack Speed 1,6, Damage 9, Durability 3333.

Axe = Enchantability 33, Harvest 5, Efficiency 17, Attack Speed 1,6, Damage 9, Durability 3333.

Pickaxe = Enchantability 33, Harvest 5, Efficiency 17, Attack Speed 1,6, Damage 9, Durability 3333.

Helm = Enchantability 33, Damage Absorb 11, Armor 7, Toughness 4, Knockback resistance 0.1.

Body = Enchantability 33, Damage Absorb 11, Armor 7, Toughness 4, Knockback resistance 0.1.

Pant = Enchantability 33, Damage Absorb 11, Armor 7, Toughness 4, Knockback resistance 0.1.

Boots = Enchantability 33, Damage Absorb 11, Armor 7, Toughness 4, Knockback resistance 0.1.

Flesh = Nutrition Value 5, Saturation 0,6.

Steak = Nutrition Value 10, Saturation 0,9.

![taxdl.11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bg28PyPr/images/d17843d7d3474f253fc3556dcf5c45a4d7ac600a.png)

Credit:

Written by Taknax. Glowing Ender Dragon by Eianex.

![taxdl.x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dvC5joX1/images/ef186d389a9df85bbb225a963477bb0a26dbe11e.png)
